title: Isodon liangshanicus
taxonomy: Isodon liangshanicus belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Isodon. The species is native to the Sichuan province in China. Isodon liangshanicus is a type of perennial herb. Its classification also includes the order Lamiales and the class Magnoliopsida.
